files.name: pivot_memo.md
files.title: Pivot Memo
files.content:
# Pivot Memo: Reply to Runtime

## Why

The reply moat is gone. Foundation models draft email natively and for
near zero marginal cost. Our vertical wrapper is being commoditized.

## Proposal

Pivot to Kestrel Runtime (codename Quokka): a horizontal runtime for
building AI agents over a company's own tools and data.

files.name: reply_growth_postmortem.md
files.title: Reply Growth Postmortem
files.content:
# Kestrel Reply Growth Postmortem

Activation stalled at 28 percent. Churn concentrated in SMB. The core
job to be done became a native model feature during 2025.

files.name: runtime_spec.md
files.title: Runtime Spec
files.content:
# Kestrel Runtime Spec (Quokka)

## Components

- Connectors: mount external tools and data
- Tool layer: permissioned, audited tool calls
- Evals: deterministic regression suite for agent behavior
